content: Backend: PM Compliance on_time = within ±reminder_offset window in complete_pm_task
Backend: Backfill on_time flag for existing pm_completions
Backend: Add time_utilization aggregation (duration by wo_type) to analytics KPIs endpoint
Frontend: AWSPage category filter hides non-matching pool columns + recalculates KPI cards
Frontend: Time Utilization donut chart in Analytics.jsx with date/line/dept filters
Run testing agent (backend + frontend) and fix any issues
